rv1805_init.tooltip: Create and initialize RV1805 I2C real-time clock

rv1805_set_time.message0: RV1805 %1 Set Time Year %2 Month %3 Day %4 Hour %5 Minute %6 Second %7
rv1805_set_time.tooltip: Set the current time on the RV1805 RTC

rv1805_update_time.tooltip: Read the latest time from RV1805 into the buffer

rv1805_get_time_field.tooltip: Read a time field from RV1805 (call Update Time first)
